monitor_the_situation.title: Iran Strikes US Bases as Trump Vows to Reinstate Sea Blockade

Iran Strikes Oil Tankers Under US Escort in Strait of Hormuz, One Killed

**Summary:**
Iran launched missiles at oil tankers under US escort in the Strait of Hormuz, killing one sailor and damaging tw

— S4 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 1d ago. Iranian forces attacked vessels in the Strait of Hormuz after warning against a US naval blockade announced by President Trump, escalating tensions at the key chokepoint.

Trump Announces US Naval Blockade of All Iranian Ports and Oil Terminals, Starting Tuesday, Warns Neutral Ships to Leave or Face Fire, Imposes 20% Toll on Strait of Hormuz Transit, Escalating Tensions
— S4 · Political · Strait of Hormuz · 1d ago. The US Army announces a naval blockade on all Iranian ports, effective from 20:00 GMT tomorrow.
